top_signals.title: Exxon fracks its blue state exit
top_signals.summary: The oil major’s investors overwhelmingly voted in favour of its proposal to move its corporate domicile to Texas
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Visa data leak piles pressure on Britain’s digital ID push
top_signals.summary: The leak of more than 100,000 passport scans and biometric selfies linked to a third-party visa website has renewed concerns over the security risks surrounding Britain’s growing shift towards digital ID systems. A site operating under the name UK Visa Portal – which is not affiliated with the UK government – was found on Wednesday [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Drone Makers Quantum and Destinus Seek Banks for 2027 IPOs
top_signals.summary: Quantum Systems and Destinus are in talks to line up advisers for potential IPOs as soon as early 2027, people familiar with the matter said, as the drone makers seek to tap surging demand for unmanned defense assets.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Crypto liquidations hit $935M as Bitcoin price dips to $72.6K
top_signals.summary: Over $935 million was wiped out across the crypto market as traders shifted their focus to $70,000 as the last line of defense for Bitcoin.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: CISA gives feds 4 days to patch actively exploited cPanel plugin flaw
top_signals.summary: The U.S. Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) has given U.S. federal agencies four days to secure their servers against a critical vulnerability in the LiteSpeed cPanel user-end plugin, which is actively being exploited in attacks. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Snowflake rockets 36% on earnings beat and plan to spend $6 billion on Amazon cloud
top_signals.summary: Snowflake is going deeper with Amazon's Web Services, and plans to use its Arm-based Graviton chips.

top_signals.title: BIS Project Agorá shows tokenized payments can settle in seconds
top_signals.summary: The Bank for International Settlements' collaboration with seven central banks and more than 40 institutions concludes a two-year project with a prototype settling wholesale payments in seconds.
